title: Dhanamanjuri University B.Voc 1st Semester Exam Time Table 2026 Released

detail.title: Dhanamanjuri University B.Voc 1st Semester Exam Time Table 2026 Released
detail.short_info: The officials of Dhanamanjuri University have released the Dhanamanjuri University Time Table 2026 for B.Voc Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

sections.heading: Dhanamanjuri University B.Voc 1st Semester Exam Time Table 2026 Released

content.text: Dhanamanjuri University has announced the B.Voc 1st Semester Exam Timetable 2026 on 09-03-2026 for the 2025 (December) academic session. The timetable is now available for students online at dmu.ac.in. Knowing the exam schedule in advance helps students effectively plan their exam preparation.

Students can check and download the official schedule by visiting the Dhanamanjuri University portal at dmu.ac.in or using the direct link provided below. It is recommended to download and save the timetable PDF for easy access and future reference.

Dhanamanjuri University has published the B.Voc 1st Semester Time Table on its official site for the 2025 (December) Academic Session. The table below highlights key details such as release date, academic session, and official link to the timetable PDF.

sections.heading: Dhanamanjuri University Time Table 2026 - Exam Dates

content.text: Dhanamanjuri University has released the official B.Voc 1st Semester Time Table 2026. The following table lists the subject-wise exam dates and schedule as per the official notification.

rows: BVMCMT-102 (Basics of Computer) / BVFVT-102 (Post-Harvest Technology of Fruits & Vegetables) / BVMLT-102 (Human Anatomy and Physiology – I) / BVPAQA-102 (Human Anatomy and Physiology-I)
BVMCMT-103 (Basics of Journalism) / BVFVT-103 (Food Microbiology) / BVMLT-103 (Microbiology – I) / BVPAQA-103 (Pharmaceutical Analysis-I)
BVMCMT-104 (Introduction to Media Technology) / BVFVT-104 (Food Chemistry) / BVMLT-104 (Biochemistry – I) / BVPAQA-104 (Pharmaceutical Technology-I)
BVRIT-104 (Patient Safety and First Aid) / BVOTT-104 (Biochemistry – I)
BVMCMT-105 (Principles of Mass Communication) / BVFVT-105 (Principles of Fruits & Vegetables Preservation) / BVMLT-105 (Pathology – I) / BVPAQA-105 (Pharmaceutical Chemistry-I)
BVRIT-105 (Introduction to Healthcare System) / BVOTT-105 (Hospital Duty, Patient care & First Aid)

sections.heading: Dhanamanjuri University Time Table 2026 Direct Download Link

content.text: Dhanamanjuri University has activated the official PDF download link for the B.Voc 1st Semester Time Table 2026. Students enrolled under the 2025 (December) can directly access and download their complete schedule using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Download Dhanamanjuri University Time Table 2026 Online?

content.text: Dhanamanjuri University has simplified the exam timetable access process for B.Voc 1st Semester students. Most timetables can be downloaded without login. Follow these steps to get your exam timetable PDF:

items: Visit the official Dhanamanjuri University website - dmu.ac.in
Go to the Examination or Academic Schedule section
Select B.Voc 1st Semester from the listed schedules
Locate the exam timetable for the 2025 (December) session
Click to open the timetable in PDF format
Download or save the file on your device
Review the schedule carefully - verify exam dates, subject names, and time slots
